name: @posthog/agent-sandbox-host
description: In-container Node host for the v2 Docker sandbox. Loads compiled tools from /workdir/tools/* and dispatches invokes via /workdir/request.json → /workdir/response.json.
author: PostHog <hey@posthog.com>

scripts.typescript:check: node --check src/host.js && node --check src/dispatch.js && node --check src/dispatch.test.js
